languages.text: "Расскажи о своих поисках — что ты пытаешься постичь?"
"Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"
languages.original_text: "Расскажи о своих поисках — что ты пытаешься постичь?"

traits.locale_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"
"Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"
"Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

languages.text: «Hábleme de su investigación. ¿Qué es lo que intenta averiguar?».
languages.original_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

traits.locale_text: «Hábleme de su investigación. ¿Qué es lo que intenta averiguar?».

languages.text: “跟我说说你的研究。你到底想弄明白什么？”
languages.original_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

traits.locale_text: “跟我说说你的研究。你到底想弄明白什么？”

languages.text: « Parlez-moi de vos recherches. Que voulez-vous découvrir ? »
languages.original_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

traits.locale_text: « Parlez-moi de vos recherches. Que voulez-vous découvrir ? »

languages.text: "Erzählt mir von Eurer Forschung — was versucht Ihr herauszufinden?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

traits.locale_text: "Erzählt mir von Eurer Forschung — was versucht Ihr herauszufinden?"

languages.text: 「君の研究について聞かせてくれ。いったい何を理解しようとしているのだ？」
languages.original_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

traits.locale_text: 「君の研究について聞かせてくれ。いったい何を理解しようとしているのだ？」

languages.text: "Bana araştırmandan bahset. Anlamaya çalıştığın şey nedir?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"

traits.locale_text: "Bana araştırmandan bahset. Anlamaya çalıştığın şey nedir?"
